title: Ore Frames
description: Are you tired of missing your mineral ores because they blend in with the surroundings? Ore Frames is a simple but effective texture pack that adds clear outline frames to all ores, making them easier to spot even in dark caves!
body:
# 🌿✨ **Ore Frames Texture Pack**  
*A clean + aesthetic enhancement for your mining adventures*

---
![ORE FRAMES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee3f7350f0bece80b5dce2b8c98fffa82387127c.png)

## 🌙 **Ore Frames**
The *Ore Frames Texture Pack* highlights all ore blocks using subtle, elegant outlines designed to improve visibility while keeping Minecraft’s original charm.

✨ **Why you’ll love it:**
- Gentle borders that make ores pop naturally  
- A soft, aesthetic style that blends with vanilla textures  
- Great for mining, exploring caves, or speedrunning  
- Lightweight and fully compatible with standard Minecraft

A small visual upgrade with a big quality-of-life boost — all while keeping things simple, clean, and beautiful. 🌾

---
